name: Data race on shared counter in RequestCounter.Increment
description: RequestCounter.Increment increments an int field without holding the mutex. The struct declares a sync.Mutex but Increment does not lock it, so concurrent HTTP handler goroutines race on the count field.

expected_findings.description: RequestCounter.Increment increments c.count without locking c.mu. Multiple goroutines calling Increment concurrently will race on the int field, causing lost updates. The mutex is declared but unused in this method.

expected_clean.description: Server entry point with no shared mutable state
